query:
DELETE mr FROM maintenance_requests mr
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT companyId, source, externalId, MIN(id) as keep_id
  FROM maintenance_requests
  WHERE externalId IS NOT NULL AND externalId != ''
  GROUP BY companyId, source, externalId
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) dups ON mr.companyId = dups.companyId 
       AND mr.source = dups.source 
       AND mr.externalId = dups.externalId
       AND mr.id != dups.keep_id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user sHLCts4RR6iL2PA.1ead08cf1a54 --database bBuQZrfKLoBs6LmtvQ4y6E --execute DELETE mr FROM maintenance_requests mr
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT companyId, source, externalId, MIN(id) as keep_id
  FROM maintenance_requests
  WHERE externalId IS NOT NULL AND externalId != ''
  GROUP BY companyId, source, externalId
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) dups ON mr.companyId = dups.companyId 
       AND mr.source = dups.source 
       AND mr.externalId = dups.externalId
       AND mr.id != dups.keep_id;
